entry.title: Where can I start learning Engineering Change Management in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Implementing Engineering Change Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition learning journey.

Overview
In this Learning Journey consultants will learn how to implement Engineering Change Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Product Lifecycle Management.

Learning objectives
In this LJ consultants will learn how to

  • Work with change master and change records
  • Perform and evaluate object changes
  • Work with release key, change hierarchy and parameter effectivity
  • Use the order change management
  • Perform an object distribution

Prerequisites

  • Applying SAP S/4HANA Product Engineering

Practice your skills in a live SAP environment 

  • Hands-on Practice for Change Management in SAP S/4HANA 

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Work Zone My Inbox / Task Center: solution to get Ope...
entry.content: yes, we are using intent-based navigation.

entry.title: Re: Use Change Audit Reports
entry.content:
Hi all,

There was a nice feature enabled in previous release to schedule reports and to deliver those reports in an sFTP location. Such csv file could then be uploaded in an external SIEM like SPLUNK.

Regards,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

 

I have completed the course Develop Applications Running on SAP BTP Using SAP HANA Cloud for certification SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP HANA Cloud 1.0.

I really love working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career.

entry.title: Re: Anniversary Tile for Managers
entry.content: Good Day,

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Stuck Queue - QM processing currently only po...

entry.title: Re: Anniversary Tile for Managers
entry.content: on this, when trying to sync serviceDate from EC to EP in order to proceed with the config as per KBA articles listed below, have found that not all data is pulling through. Some users' serviceDate data from EC is not syncing and pulling through to EP (BizX) and therefore cannot see Anniversary card on Home Page because the data is not present. Any ideas or suggestions why this could be happening? To some users and not all.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Greetings @David_Chaviano,

My name is Veronica and I'm a trans woman from Argentina without the means to afford a certification attempt on my own.

I'm interested in switching careers, my path learning computer science from an artistic background eventually led to the learning SAP through the "SAP S/4 HANA Implementation Consultant" learning journey and more recently "SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition, Finance" learning journey.

Getting a free certification attempt could mean a significant jumpstart in achieving my career goals, being a woman, belonging to a minority who doesn't have equal opportunity in my geographic location, this is something I'd appreciate greatly.

Best regards,

Veronica.

entry.title: Re: Unable to extend E_JournalEntryItem with association
entry.content:
Unfortunately, you can't. At least not in a S/4 HANA Public Edition environment.


Which it indeed is not. You can use it in Key User Apps, not in Cloud Development... which this is, Developer Extensibility.


Will try to find a way around it, let's see what we can find.

entry.title: Audio recording in web app
entry.content:
Hi there.

I have successfully been able to implement audio recording in my mobile apps using the start recording audio and stop recording audio flow functions. But when I try to use the same flow functions in my web app. I keep getting errors such as:

- Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'audioFile') 

-Failed to execute 'requestData' on 'MediaRecorder': The MediaRecorder's state is 'inactive'.

Does anyone know how to record audio and get the audio file within SAP Build Apps community edition?

@MaiaraEllwanger @Sankara1 @EsmeeX @Jakub_Roguski @Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: powerdesigner shortcut entities not showing attributes
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a EDM in Powerdesigner. Within the EDM I have been utilising packages to allow me to build 'Specific Business Area' data models while using the EDM data structure.

This has been working fine, I bring in entities from the EDM into the subpackage which creates shortcuts. Shortcuts appear with attributes and when clicking on the shortcut it takes you to the actual entity so you can navigate the 'True' entity.

However, today when logging on  the appearance has changed. The Entity shortcuts now do not appear with attributes, and when clicking on the shortcuts it brings up the 'shortcut properties' opposed to bringing up the 'nonshort' entity where you can view comments, Descriptions, Business rule ect....

Please see screenshot below of what I am seeing:

SAP PowerDesigner

entry.title: PO and STO in the same shipment
entry.content:
Hi,

The SAP Help is telling that InBound Deliveries (IBD) and OutBound ones (OBD) can't be placed together in the same shipment.

As the business is raising this as a requirement, in order to optimize the shipments, I would like to ask if anyone achieved this in specific.

Thanks in advance

BR

Yan

entry.title: Re: How to use cl_gui_alv_tree->add_node correctly?
entry.content:
Why do you say you need to "rewrite all"? If you add one node, you just have to add one "OR 'new node key'", it's not "rewrite all".

Wrong usage: don't use text symbols for node_key, because the text is not to be translated. Instead, use a constant.

This next line should be a text symbol because it can be potentially translated, so you should append the text symbol number you want: 

i_node_text      = 'Загрузка на портал'(001)

Obsolete: "call method obj_tree->add_node" (instead, use "obj_tree->add_node").

entry.title: Memory and CPU Consumption in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: In SAP Analytics Cloud, how can I access Memory and CPU consumption of Stories, Dashboards, and Data Actions when user executes?

entry.title: The CFO's guide to improving cash flow
entry.content:
As a finance leader, you need to balance multiple priorities, such as pinpointing and eliminating operational bottlenecks, optimizing Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) and working capital.

These responsibilities are even more crucial in today’s high-interest rate environment, where every dollar stuck in receivables can affect your company’s financial health. Every dollar collected quickly from customers is a dollar that can be put to work, rather than becoming a potential drag on financial performance.

Are you ready to unlock hidden value in your financial processes and drive meaningful improvements in your organization? If so, I encourage you to download our “CFO's Guide to Improving Cash Flow”.  

The power of process mining and analytics solutions

In the fast-paced world of finance, it's easy for once-streamlined processes to become convoluted as your organization grows. These inefficiencies affect your bottom line and can stifle innovation, slow decision-making, and erode your competitive edge. But what if you could turn these complexities into opportunities?

Our guide explains how SAP Signavio solutions give you a data-driven view of your finance processes, allowing you to:

  • Pinpoint and eliminate operational bottlenecks that drain resources.
  • Make decisions backed by real-time, data-driven insights to optimize your financial strategies.
  • Optimize key financial metrics like Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) to improve cash flow.
  • Streamline processes to reduce cycle times and boost productivity, allowing your team to focus on value-added activities.

In a recent value challenge initiative we ran across 75 organizations, SAP Signavio solutions uncovered over $2 billion in combined potential value. Imagine what our powerful process mining and analytics solutions could do for your company!

Why The CFO’s guide to cash flow is a game-changer

Finance is no longer just about managing numbers—it's about leveraging data to create strategic advantages. Our guide helps you:

  1. Master the lead-to-cash cycle by identifying and addressing bottlenecks that silently drain your resources.
  2. Leverage cutting-edge process mining and analytics to gain a crystal-clear view of your operations, revealing inefficiencies and improvement opportunities you might not have noticed.
  3. Optimize working capital by freeing up cash tied in receivables, giving you more financial flexibility for growth initiatives.

This isn’t just theory—it’s about real-world application. For example, companies leveraging SAP Signavio solutions have seen improvements such as faster time-to-cash, reduced Days Sales Outstanding (DSO), and increased productivity across finance functions.

From complexity to clarity

As your organization grows, the simplicity of your financial processes often becomes overshadowed by complexity. Our guide shows you how to break down these complexities, turning them into powerful tools for growth. With a strategic approach to process optimization, you can unlock hidden value in your operations, ultimately turning financial hurdles into springboards for success.

Think about it: What if every process within your organization was better aligned to support your financial goals? What if every inefficiency could be turned into an opportunity for greater profitability? Our guide is the first step to achieving this vision.

Beyond Traditional Finance

Your role as CFO goes beyond managing the balance sheet. You're now a strategic partner in shaping company-wide initiatives, including ESG (environmental, social, and governance), talent management, and supply chain optimization.

Our guide illustrates how streamlined financial processes can free up time and resources, empowering you to drive strategic initiatives.

Your Path to Financial Excellence

Are you ready to take the next step toward financial excellence? Download “The CFO’s Guide to Improving Cash Flow” to learn how to:

  • Gain insights into optimizing your lead-to-cash cycle and uncover areas for improvement.
  • Use SAP Signavio solutions to identify the value hidden in your financial processes.
  • Boost productivity and optimize working capital, giving you the resources to drive growth.
  • Be inspired by real-world testimonials from industry leaders.

Your journey to financial excellence begins with the right tools and insights—get the guide to understand what’s possible for your organization.

Download your free guide now

entry.title: Asttx field not updateing in va42
entry.content:
I have an issue .. As for tcode va42. , user status field rv45-asttx field is showing status of create . Even though I changed it to release and saved , after revisiting same document its shows create status..

How can i proceed for this problem

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @CesarDelFierro it sounds like you have a great SAP career. Are you engaged in SAP TechEd - SAP Community?

entry.title: Cannot run "Run Data Mapping" in QS4
entry.content: In Group reporting QS4 the "Run Data Mapping" does not create a job and as a result no data can be loaded into Group reporting. How can we fix this. Who can fix this

entry.title: Reporting on changes to Financial Authority
entry.content:
Good afternoon all,

I have a business need to report on changes in an employees financial authority limit. I would need to report on who the change relates to, who actioned the change, when the change occurred and what the new financial authority limit value is - this includes increases and decreases, including changes from 0 to a positive number. 

I have run the change audit report for employees but this does not contain the specific information I require, such as the numerical value of the change.

Does anyone have an approach that will enable me to report on changes to financial authority? 

Thanks,

Chantelle

I have already created a ticket regarding this issue but have not received a response. What should I do now?

Merchant Name : RATIOCINATE DYNAMICS PRIVATE LIMITED is this the correct Transaction Merchant name Please confirm

entry.title: FICA House bank info in fica document
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have one issue with fica posting. In the payment posting, there is house bank field and it was filled with something which doesn't exist for the related company code (How come system allowed I dont know). When I transfer to FI, i got error House bank ID XXX does not exist for company code ABC. Users reversed this posting and reversal document have house bank info too. Payment lot still contain this house bank information since reconciliation key was also closed how i can change house bank information in the paymet lot ? And how we can fix those documents? 

 

Regards,

Merve

entry.title: Re: Guide to use HANA NSE in the BW/4HANA system
entry.content:
hi @Dominik_Graus 

the note mentioned by you is not full, and also seems outdated.

please see this one, for example:

2374652 - Handling Very Large Data Volumes in SAP BW/4HANA

 warm data resides in the warm store leveraging SAP HANA Extension Nodes or SAP HANA Native Storage Extension, and cold data can be relocated to the cold store in SAP IQ. Up to and including SAP BW/4HANA 2021 SP03, NSE is only supported for single node systems. As from SAP BW/4HANA 2021 SP04, it is also supported for scale-out systems, see SAP Help for details

please ask your colleagues to update one or other document then

Kind regards,
Andrey

entry.title: Re: debug doesn't work
entry.content: Check the user with which you are logged in in c4c and the user that you have put in the sdk for the debug. Administration / Option and setting... /SAP/General Settings /Debugging and tracing

entry.title: Re: debug doesn't work
entry.content: Check the user with which you are logged in in c4c and the user that you have put in the sdk for the debug.Administration / Option and setting... /SAP/General Settings /Debugging and tracing

entry.title: Re: How long does it take to confirm a payment for certification?
entry.content:
Hi @praveen7304 
Please share the ticket number and the ticket system where you reported the issue. 
So I will then follow up and will do whatever I can to help, so that you can proceed with your learnings
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: EHS : Find Pure Substance From Real Substance
entry.content:
Hi,

I think there is a BAPI but I was not able to track it down. However, I was able to get the pure substance from a real substance by following below.

Step 1: Pass the real substance to the ESTRH-subidand take the RECNROOT/RECN.

Step 2: Pass the RECNROOT/RECN to the ESTVH-recnroot and the required characteristics to ESTVH-estcat.

Step 3: The recn value from step 2 is to be passed to ESTVA-recntvh and take the recn value.

Step 4: Pass the recn value to ESTVP-recntva and get the recncmp value.

Step 5: finally, pass the recncmp to ESTRH-recnroot & subcat = ´PURE_SUB´ to get the pure substance.

entry.title: Re: How to list users group with sap bo rest api?
entry.content: Ok, First, I will get the ids of all user groups belonging to the user with the cms query, then I will use this id in the endpoint you sent, send the user_id to the body and complete the process, right?

entry.title: Re: Scheluding exam problem
entry.content:
Hi @berk_abay 
i am glad that our support team was able to solve the issue you reported via the ticket.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...
entry.content:
To anyone having this issue:
Make sure your CMS DB supports the AL32UTF8 character set.
Since SP04, the SAP BI development team has added/made some changes to CMS query parameters (the parameter strings are sent in UTF-8 to use the “cached execution plan”), which affects correct writing and reading to/from the Aliases table and others.

To check your CMS DB, run the following SQL command on your database and see the result
(example: Oracle DB)

If you get different results, you are having problems adding/modifying groups and users.

Unless SAP changes this in the next patches, there is unfortunately NO workaround to solve this problem. You should migrate your CMS database to a database that has the ALU32UTF8 character set.

entry.title: Re: How to list users group with sap bo rest api?
entry.content: Correct

Margit

I would like to create a large number of job code in successfactors LMS. I know that we can do it manually.

But is it possible to do it by import? Or the only other way is by the connector?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Shopping Cart Monitor in SRM 7
entry.content:
• Login to SAP SRM GUI
  • Tcode ->  bbp_pd 
  • object id - shopping cart number
  • select the line item
  • goto workflow -> workflow overview -select the line item -> display workflow log
  • click on ready icon -> agent
  • here you can see the status of the shopping cart whom it is pending for approval with.

Please help 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Significance of WCM Objects
entry.content:
Answer from Eerly AI SAP Consultant

Hello! The Work Clearance Management (WCM) module in SAP is part of the Plant Maintenance (PM) and Environment, Health, and Safety (EH&S) components. It is designed to ensure safe working conditions during maintenance activities. Below are the explanations and significance of the WCM objects you mentioned:

### 1. Valuation

**Significance:**
- Valuation in WCM refers to the assessment and determination of the safety conditions and risks associated with a particular work area or equipment.

**Usages:**
- **Risk Assessment:** Helps in identifying potential hazards and evaluating the risks involved in performing maintenance tasks.
- **Safety Measures:** Determines the necessary safety precautions and measures to be taken to mitigate identified risks.
- **Documentation:** Provides a documented record of the safety conditions and risk assessments, which is essential for compliance and audit purposes.

### 2. Work Approval

**Significance:**
- Work Approval is a formal authorization process that ensures all necessary checks and safety measures are in place before commencing maintenance work.

**Usages:**
- **Authorization:** Ensures that work can only proceed once it has been formally approved by the responsible authority or personnel.
- **Compliance:** Helps in complying with safety regulations and standards by ensuring that all safety protocols are followed.
- **Coordination:** Facilitates coordination among different departments and stakeholders by providing a clear approval workflow.

### 3. Work Clearance Application (WCA)

**Significance:**
- The Work Clearance Application (WCA) is a request document that initiates the process of obtaining clearance for performing maintenance work.

**Usages:**
- **Request for Clearance:** Acts as a formal request to begin the process of obtaining safety clearances for the work to be performed.
- **Information Gathering:** Collects all relevant information about the work to be performed, including the scope, location, and timing.
- **Workflow Initiation:** Triggers the workflow for further WCM processes such as valuation, work approval, and the creation of work clearance documents.

### 4. Work Clearance Document (WCD)

**Significance:**
- The Work Clearance Document (WCD) is the critical document that provides the final clearance for maintenance work to proceed. It consolidates all necessary approvals and safety measures.

**Usages:**
- **Final Authorization:** Provides the final authorization for work to commence, ensuring that all safety measures and approvals are in place.
- **Safety Instructions:** Details the safety instructions and conditions under which the work can be performed.
- **Monitoring:** Allows for the monitoring and tracking of the work clearance status throughout the maintenance process.

### 5. Additional Application

**Significance:**
- The Additional Application in WCM is used to handle special or additional safety requirements that are not covered by the standard WCM processes.

**Usages:**
- **Custom Safety Requirements:** Allows for the inclusion of custom or additional safety requirements that may arise during the maintenance process.
- **Flexibility:** Provides flexibility to adapt to unique safety scenarios that require special handling.
- **Supplementary Documentation:** Acts as supplementary documentation to the Work Clearance Document, ensuring comprehensive safety coverage.

### Summary

- **Valuation:** Assesses risks and determines safety measures.
- **Work Approval:** Formal authorization to start work.
- **Work Clearance Application (WCA):** Initiates the clearance process.
- **Work Clearance Document (WCD):** Provides final clearance and safety instructions.
- **Additional Application:** Handles special or additional safety requirements.

Would you like more detailed information on any specific WCM object, or do you have any further questions related to WCM or other SAP modules?

entry.title: Re: Is there some release news in Community 2024? (fixes, improvements)
entry.content: Hi, @Sandra_Rossi: Could you share a screenshot of an area where you see deletion as an option? As Craig mentioned, that shouldn't be available.

entry.title: Re: Retrieving "Specifications" Text from T-CODE QE03
entry.content:
Dear Duro_Nguyen,

thank you for the details provided.

As far as I understand you are seeking for the logic how value into the field 'Specifications' (QAMKR-TOLGRENZE) is written. Please check this function module:

QSS4_PREPARE_CHAR_SUM_DATA.

Have a nice day,

Albert

entry.title: Re: Validation failed while deploying an iflow with usage of write data store operations
entry.content: Check this. This article helped me resolve similar issue - https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3487951

entry.title: For Story Learning reports, need to see item titles, etc. in multiple languages. How?
entry.content: Currently, if you run a Story report for Learning, it presents the data in the SF admin language preference.  For our system, the default is UK English, but for Learning the default is US English.  Also, we have multiple languages enabled for Learning but not for the rest of the SF suite.  Consequently, when you run Story reports, Item titles, etc. are generally blank because there is not a UK translation.  It would also be extremely helpful to be able to see what locales are populated for an item, curricula, program, etc.  Many of ours cover multiple languages.  Is there/will there be a way to bring in the translations for the various locales?

entry.title: Re: Is there some release news in Community 2024? (fixes, improvements)
entry.content: @jerryjanda It was available for one comment I had just created September 22nd, I'll do the screenshot if I see it again.

entry.title: Re: Wrong File Path(Z:\temp\ ) when GUI upload program called from Fiori launchpad
entry.content: Did you fix this? I am facing the same issue, need help please.

entry.title: Re: Is there some release news in Community 2024? (fixes, improvements)
entry.content:
Okay, I have one. It's not for comments in Q&A or blog posts, it's for comments in discussions:

e.g. https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/how-to-use-cl-gui-alv-tree-gt-add-node-correctly/m-p/13884583

entry.title: Re: Datasphere source system assignment pointing to Dev after moving to Qual system for replication
entry.content: We are using Hana Connection and our source connection is Hana DB on BWonHana . looking for Schema mapping table or similar approach

entry.title: Re: Guide to use HANA NSE in the BW/4HANA system
entry.content:
Hi @AndreyF,

Indeed, NSE is supported for ADSOs in SAP BW/4HANA, but only if you use the built-in Data Tiering Optimization (DTO) feature, not by executing ALTER TABLE statements in the database.

Regards,
Dominik

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields and Logics - Create and Capturing the Changes into Transport Request
entry.content: Yes, the behavior is standard in SAP. When you modify custom fields or related configurations in SAP CFL the transport request (TR) often includes the entire object, not just the specific value changes, due to how SAP handles object versioning.

entry.title: Re: Table For Downpayment
entry.content: what is the table name which store SAP customers down payment made

entry.title: Re: How to use cl_gui_alv_tree->add_node correctly?
entry.content:
Let's imagine i have 10 nodes in mine tree. And if the node is even - i'm going to show one alv, whe it's odd - the other.

And i need to add node at the fifth position. The node's from 5 to 10 - will change their 'node_key' to 6-11.

5 become 6, 6 become 7 and so on.

And part of code, which was setting which (alv, toolbar, fieldcat and so on ) would be shown  in a screen is not works anymore, cause it 'node_key' is change, for the elements from 5 to 10 -> 6-11.

Now i'm checking  only 'node_key' for the logic and then decide which alv i would show.

'node_key' is char12 with the numc value in it.And it's filled automatically after 'add_node' method.

entry.title: Re: Significance of WCM Objects
entry.content: Hi Rick , Thanks very much for such detail information . One more info ,I would like to know about populating Valuation or Work Approval button in Work order . I have seen that if I assign control key "WCM" ,this button gets populated but same this does not happen if I use other control key . What is the separate configuration done at WCM control key level in order populate valuation or work approval button ? Also if I assign some permit at Work order , we find that this button gets populated . What is the separate configuration done at this permit level ?Best Regards

entry.title: Why the Test Automation Tool (TAT) is a Better Choice Than Cloud ALM for Testing
entry.content: @Sonam - Our client initially requested Cloud ALM for manual testing, but we recommended the Test Automation Tool (TAT) as it provides more flexibility, advanced automation features, and is better suited for managing complex testing scenarios, making it a more efficient solution for the project. Could you please provide a proper explanation on why TAT is a better choice?

entry.title: Re: unable to open attachment in the invoice in PDF
entry.content: This is access issue take help from security team.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Component.getRouter() does not exist
entry.content:
Hi there, do you have this line in your Component file?

this.getRouter().initialize();

In your code you are referring to getOwnerComponent (which is the Component file in your case).

entry.title: Re: Credit checks available in SAP Credit Management (FSCM)
entry.content:
@edina_j0zs4 Thank you very much for this document. 

It helps one understand Credit Check functionality in FSCM very well. All the SAP Notes / KBA's mentioned are relevant and provide good information.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: A great opportunity for everyone to learn about SAP.

entry.title: Re: Data Attribute Recommendation - Get Authorization error in Postman
entry.content: Please check that you are using the environment of data-attribute-recommendations-environment in Postman

entry.title: Re: Report in MM module for Invoice due for payment
entry.content:
You can create a query using SQ01/SQVI combining tables RBKP/RSEG/BSIK, no development needed & will meet your requirement.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Data Attribute Recommendation - Get Authorization err...
entry.content:
Please check that you are using the environment of data-attribute-recommendations-environment in Postman

Once you change the environment to Data-attribute-recommendations-environment it should work

entry.title: SAC Commentary time
entry.content:
Hello All

We have used commentary solution in a SAC table where users use the time filter to change month & provide comment for the selected month.

 

I have now a requriement to show the latest commented date for every month.

 

Any thoughts/ideas on the solution.

 

SAP Analytics Cloud #Comment #SAC

entry.title: Re: App "Reprocess bank statement items / F1520": Post partial payment
entry.content: Hey Edrilan,

entry.title: Re: Custom field in service entry sheet Fiori App
entry.content:
The additional column is that part of your CDS view? Or do you want to connect it to something completely different?

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/overview/introduction

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/table/tableCustoms

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/customElements/customElementsOverview

In some cases you can create a freestyle table with your columns and connect it to a json model. You can prefill the json model with odata v2 calls (for v4 you need a fetch call).

I don't know exactly what you are looking for, please post a bit more info if possible. I even doubt if you are using fiori elements. I don't see much of standard out of the box functionality for tables in your screenshot (like personalization).

Happy to help!

Noël

entry.title: Re: How to use cl_gui_alv_tree->add_node correctly?
entry.content: Thanks, I understand. When building your tree (ADD_NODE), build a new internal table to contain the "ALV Grid ID" to use for each node key. When ITEM_DOUBLE_CLICK is called, access this internal table to retrieve the "ALV Grid ID" to display corresponding to the node key.

entry.title: Localization and Identity & Access Management with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408
entry.content:
Hello and welcome to this blog covering the release highlights for localization and Identity & Access Management (IAM) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408. With this release, we deliver a new local version for public sector and additional features for SAP-delivered local versions. In addition, we offer an improved access to documentation for Identity and Access Management (IAM).

Topics covered in this blog:

Localization

  • Local Version for Public Sector
  • Enhancements for Existing SAP-Delivered Versions

Identity and Access Management (IAM)

  • Unified Access to Documentation About Identity and Access Management on SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Note 3467577 'Change Overview for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408'

 

Localization

Local Version for Public Sector

With the new release, we add a new local industry version for Public Sector including government budget and grants management, fund accounting, and core scope items for finance, procurement, logistics, asset accounting, treasury, leasing, sales, plant maintenance, contract account, and project management.

Value Proposition

Support of public sector users with public cloud solution specific for Germany, Canada, Australia, the Netherlands, and the United Kingdom.

Capabilities

The new scope items in solution scenario SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Public Sector are 6YU, 7AU, 71S, 78S, 6UC, 6R3, 6X0.

Note

For Germany and Canada, an initial version was already delivered with release 2402. New scope items as per above are planned to be added.

For the US all customers not needing GASB accounting principles should also use this version with 2408. These customers shall not use the separate Public Sector edition for the US SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud for public sector any more.

 

Enhancements of Existing Local Versions

Local Versions

Local versions help you meet local requirements by taking into account diverse legal frameworks, and different languages, and by complying with a wide range of local financial reporting standards, tax calculations and laws.

​Value Proposition​

  • Steer business operations globally with ease utilizing SAP-delivered localizations​
  • Address increasing legal changes and compliance requirements on time​
  • Leverage standard processes and automation to address regulatory requirements worldwide, like taxes, e-invoicing, statutory reporting, and payments
New Capabilities for Existing SAP-Delivered Local Versions

Chile

  • Purchase register
  • Sales register

Greece

  • Accounting documents report / document journals

Japan

  • Enhancement of the monthly invoice printing form
  • VAT return to include contract accounting documents

Oman

  • Withholding tax declaration

Peru

  • Inventory and balance ledger for statutory reporting

Serbia

  • E-invoicing for incoming invoices
  • Journal entries audit files

Singapore

  • Payment items approval
  • Cash flow statement

Slovenia

  • Acquisition tax accrual solution
  • BST, KRD and SFT reports
  • Deferred tax

Spain

  • Enablement of SEPA formats for 2024

Switzerland

  • Implementation of a dunning letter
  • Cash flow statement

Ukraine

  • Balance sheet, profit and loss, and cash flow statements
  • Output print forms for logistics

United Kingdom

  • Direct-debit synchronization, notification of mandate changes, and SAP Fiori app for mandate
  • Intercompany settlement in convergent invoicing

 

Identity and Access Management (IAM)

Unified Access to Documentation About Identity and Access Management on SAP Help Portal

Unlock the full potential of SAP S/4HANA Cloud with the unified access to documentation about Identity and Access Management on SAP Help Portal. With user and identity management, roles and authorization, and authentication, you can control and specify user access to apps, ensuring regulatory compliance and security standards. Familiarize yourself with the key concepts and apps to streamline implementation along the different phases and maximize efficiency.

 

Value Proposition 

  • One-stop shop for identity and access management (IAM) documentation
  • Documentation of tasks related to IAM for the different implementation phases (prepare, realize, run, and upgrade) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and integrated products
  • Overview of apps for user and identity management, roles and authorization, and authentication

 

Capabilities 

  • Support users in each implementation phase with dedicated IAM documentation
  • Provide a holistic view on IAM for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and integrated products from initial system access to tasks that need to be completed before, during, and after the upgrade of SAP S/4HANA Cloud solutions
  • Gain an overview of different identity management scenarios

For more information, see Identity and Access Management

 

 

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. 

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn and X.

 

️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series! 

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find a recording and a presentation for GRC, Trade and Tax as well as 19 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand – anywhere, anytime. 

 

Find All of Our Assets 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

My name is Martin. I started learning with SAP in university and I have joined S/4HANA ERP Simulation Competition for student. This event offers an exhilarating journey for me to learn SAP functions that help businesses make effectively decisions, understand main business processes and analyze business performance. After that I join a software company as a FICO consultant. 

I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career. 

Thank you for your time and I hope you will take into consideration my application.

Best regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: Plan Better for Smooth Data Migration
entry.content: @anand_rao3  Fantastic Summery

entry.title: Sales Order number not populated at the time of Adjust Numbering Phase in RAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created ODATA V4 Web API using RAP to create Sales Order using  EML on I_SALESORDERTP in a custom Action.  Once the action method is executed, adjust numbering of this custom API is triggered and the adjust numbering method  of I_SALESORDERTP is triggered after the custom API adjust numbering and due to this we are unable to find the Sales Order number during Custom API adjust numbering method. 

Why is SAP RAP triggering I_SALESORDERTP Adjust numbering method after the custom API adjust numbering? 

Due to this limitation in RAP framework, we are using BAPI - BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEDAT2 with Destination None as commit is not supported directly in RAP and multiple commits for multiple sales Order update is also not supported. 

Do we have any better straight forward solution to this in RAP?? 

@Andre_Fischer  -  Could u pls help on this issue? 

 

Thanks,

Vivek

entry.title: Re: App "Reprocess bank statement items / F1520": Post partial payment
entry.content: Hi Edrilan, We have a requirement when creating a residual item in FEBAN or while reprocessing a bank statement. The system should post the residual item using a new document type instead of DZ. Do you know if this is possible? Every time I try to clear an invoice in FEBAN or RBS and create a residual item, the system generates another DZ document instead of using the new document type I created in SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Financial Accounting -> Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable -> Business Transactions -> Open Item Clearing -> Clearing Differences -> Residual Item Posting in Invoice Currency. I would really appreciate it if you have a good solution for this.

It looks like the points from Peteberfest 2024 haven't been added to the gameboard. Could you please check and update them?

 

Thanks,

vishala

entry.title: Re: Build Failing with Client runtime version 4.11.167
entry.content: The same with my app (Runtime 4.11.167).

entry.title: Re: Cannot run "Run Data Mapping" in QS4
entry.content:
• Hi Salma, I ran this through our SAP AI Consultant and got the following response, let me know if this is helpful

    In SAP Group Reporting on S/4HANA (often referred to as QS4), the "Run Data Mapping" step is crucial for loading data into Group Reporting. If the "Run Data Mapping" does not create a job and as a result, no data can be loaded, it can be a significant issue. Here are some steps to troubleshoot and potentially fix this issue:

    Steps to Fix "Run Data Mapping" Issue in SAP Group Reporting

    1. Check Authorization:

      • Ensure that the user running the "Run Data Mapping" has the necessary authorizations. Missing authorizations can prevent the job from being created or executed.
      • Verify roles and authorizations in transaction SU01 or PFCG.

    2. Review Configuration:

      • Double-check the configuration settings in the Data Mapping section. Ensure that all mappings are correctly defined and there are no missing mandatory fields.
      • Go to the configuration app for Data Mapping and review the settings.

    3. Check Job Logs:

      • If a job is not being created, there might be logs indicating why. Check the job logs in transaction SM37 or the Fiori app for job monitoring.
      • Look for any error messages or warnings that might give a clue about what is going wrong.

    4. System Logs and Traces:

      • Check the system logs using transaction SM21 for any system-related issues that might be preventing the job from being created.
      • Review application logs in transaction SLG1 for any specific errors related to Group Reporting.

    5. Verify Data Source:

      • Ensure that the data source being used for the Data Mapping is correctly configured and accessible.
      • Test the connection to the data source to ensure there are no connectivity issues.

    6. Update and Patches:

      • Ensure that your SAP system is up to date with the latest support packages and patches. Sometimes, issues are resolved in newer updates.
      • Check SAP Notes for any known issues and apply relevant notes if necessary.

    7. Consult SAP Support:

      • If the issue persists, it might be necessary to consult SAP Support. Open a support ticket with SAP and provide detailed information about the issue, including any error messages and logs.

    Who Can Fix This?

    • SAP Basis Team:

      • They can check system logs, job logs, and ensure that the system is up to date with the latest patches.
      • They can also verify and adjust authorizations if required.

    • SAP Functional Consultant:

      • They can review the configuration settings in Group Reporting and Data Mapping.
      • They can ensure that all mappings are correctly defined and troubleshoot any configuration issues.

    • SAP Support:

      • If internal resources are unable to resolve the issue, SAP Support can provide assistance. They have access to a broader range of tools and knowledge to diagnose and fix the problem.

    By following these steps and involving the appropriate personnel, you should be able to identify and resolve the issue with the "Run Data Mapping" in SAP Group Reporting.

entry.title: SAP ASE backup server
entry.content:
Good Day,

Running SAP ASE 16 SP04 on SuSe Linux 15.x configured for using  Linux huge pages .

Q: Is SAP ASE Backup Server capable of using huge pages or  are they intended just for ASE..?

Q: Does the Linux memory usage  for dump/load operations increase when ASE is using huge pages?

Thank you

Regards

Jose

I would like to know if it is still necessary to implement the Special Ledger for closing processes (OBJVAL and OBREG) in REFX if client will be in S4Hana?

The process involves the following OSS notes:

SAP note 2624449

SAP note 2660070

SAP Real Estate Management 

Thanks in advance.

Regards.

Peter.

 P.S. @franz_posch sorry for linking to you directly but I know that you are the official REFX expert into the community.

entry.title: Re: Introduction to ABAP Channels
entry.content: kind a impressive!

entry.title: Re: How can I prevent materials with the deletion flag fr...
entry.content:
Hi Wendy, I ran this through our Eerly.ai SAP AI Consultant and got the following response.  Let me know if this answers your question.

SAP AI Consultant

In the SAP S/4HANA public cloud system, to ensure that a product with a deletion flag set does not show up in the material list, you need to follow these steps:

  1. Set the Deletion Flag in the Manage Product Master Data App:

    • Navigate to the "Manage Product Master Data" app.
    • Locate the product you wish to mark for deletion.
    • Set the deletion flag for the product. This action indicates that the product is no longer active and should not be used in any future transactions.

  2. Configure the Material List to Exclude Deleted Products:

    • The standard material list should automatically exclude products marked with a deletion flag. However, if it still appears, you may need to adjust the filters in your material list view.
    • Open the material list app or transaction.
    • Apply a filter to exclude products with the deletion flag. Typically, you can filter out items where the deletion indicator is set.

  3. Archiving and Deletion of Product Data:

    • For a more permanent solution, consider archiving the product data. Archiving moves the data to a separate storage area where it is no longer part of the active database but can still be retrieved if needed.
    • Use the archiving object relevant to material master data (e.g., MM_MATNR) to archive the product.
    • Navigate to the "SAP Information Lifecycle Management (ILM)" to configure and control the archiving and deletion process.

  4. Ensure Data Protection Compliance:

    • Make sure that your actions comply with data protection regulations. Use the SAP Information Lifecycle Management (ILM) to manage the blocking and deletion of personal data.
    • Refer to the product assistance for SAP S/4HANA on the SAP Help Portal for detailed guidance on data protection and archiving.

  5. Verification:

    • After setting the deletion flag and configuring the material list, verify that the product no longer appears in the material list.
    • Perform a search or run a report to ensure that the product is excluded from active listings.

By following these steps, you can effectively manage the visibility of products marked for deletion in your SAP S/4HANA public cloud system. For more detailed information, you can refer to the product assistance documentation on the SAP Help Portal at SAP S/4HANA Help Portal under Product Assistance Cross Components Data Protection.

entry.title: Re: Guide to use HANA NSE in the BW/4HANA system
entry.content:
hi @Dominik_Graus 

thanks for your comment and clarification, but you see, most probably SAP documentation is not clear/straightforward here.

also, a couple of points, when we are using the DTO warm option in the BW MT, it creates an additional indexserver, and moves the table here, even in the scale-in scenario, without additional nodes, I did traces of it, so if you interested you can write me on email and I can show it to you. So from my PoV, the functionality is not there, that's why we had to go this way.

I understand why SAP may not easily recommend the mentioned scenario, due to the fact the wrong use of it could create problems, but even if it will work perfectly, NSE advisor mostly recommends moving the indexes of the tables, which you cannot do with the standard functionality, and we gain the most benefits out of it.

so long story short, it would be cool if the vendors' documentation would be improved so that it would be clearer, and if the DTO would work "out of the box" together with NSE advisor, e.g. NSE advisor will also analyse a table group, so it would not be needed to check the single objects, but rather the whole group, like NSE.

so, if you are interested in the customer's feedback, I'm open for a call and discussion

kind regards,

Andrey

entry.title: Default sort on Promotion Management app
entry.content: Is there a way to configure the default sort of items in the Promotion Management app in CMC? Currently its being sorted by Creation Date and would like to default sort it to Name instead.

could not initialize ssh transport layer for file location object<error -5> unable to exchange encryption key.

kindly provide proper solution..Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE backup server
entry.content:
No answers, just questions:

Do you see a change in the HugePages* values in /proc/meminfo before and after starting Backup Server?

Do you see a change in memory usage (by Backup Server) for dump/load when ASE is using huge pages?

entry.content: I guess something is missing in your project. Have a look at the TS sample here: https://sap-samples.github.io/ui5-typescript-walkthrough/step-30/README.html

entry.title: Re: Making an OnPremise ABAP CI/CD with Github Actions
entry.content:
I was wondering what was that /ATRM/ namespace I found among the open source namespaces at SAP... now I know 😉

I've been working a lot recently on the CI/CD processes for an on-prem S4, but my focus is more set on the delivery of add-ons than on the propagation to target/production systems. I will definitely take a look at your TRM approach!

entry.title: Re: Guide to use HANA NSE in the BW/4HANA system
entry.content:
Hi @AndreyF,

Thanks for your feedback.

DTO warm tier can be either NSE or Extension Nodes. With NSE, no additional resp. dedicated HANA node is required.

In case of NSE as a warm tier, when temperature schema is on object level, for an ADSO with temperature 'warm', all relevant tables and related indexes are converted as page loadable objects. When temperature schema is on partition level, the same applies to all relevant partitions of that ADSO with temperature 'warm' and related indexes of these partitions.

Regards,
Dominik

entry.title: create Email template in C4C?
entry.content:
Dear All.

As I have no experience, kindly asking if any one could let me know what steps are needed to follow in order to create an email Template in C4C for Service Center?

Thank you in advance.

Regards,
Nikos

entry.title: Re: ASE has problems w/new disk controllers with 4 kbyte...
entry.content:
Note that, for servers having this problem, if you install ASE with a 4k page size, the problem will not occur. 

On my Linux server, the command lsblk -o "PHY-SEC,LOG-SEC" shows 4096 for both of these columns.  I think the LOG-SEC value equaling 4096 might be associated with the problem.

And just for review, the only way to migrate between page sizes is to use the sybmigrate utility.

entry.content:
Hi Mark,

 Just this image that shows the memory  usage after a load operation.  

I can check for the other info

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

I am a graduate of BS Accountancy. I would like learn SAP and be certified for SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Financial Accounting.

I identify as a person in below categories:

• Women
• People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts
• People looking to switch their careers mid-life
• People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves

I have started my learning journey and excited to finish it and learn more about the SAP.

Sincerely,
Krizia

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

My name is Tien and I'm from Vietnam. I saw your post just recently and deeply appreciated the opportunity you've given to the SAP community and those who want to make a new change in their career. I am a young woman and have been in the SAP industry for over 1 year as a SAP BI consultant and I'm eager to make a career change for my desired career path as a SAP FICO consultant. I want to use this opportunity to help me learn new knowledge for my career switch. 

Thank you so much and I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

Tien

Thanks,

Jamal
